system.text: You are a senior engineer. Explain how Bearer token authentication works and when to rotate an API key, but never echo a secret back to the user.

content.text:
Here is my config so you understand the environment:
NODE_ENV=production
PORT=3000
DEBUG=true
LOG_LEVEL=info
API_BASE_URL=https://api.example.com/v1
The word secret appears in prose here, and the token budget is 4096.

Sure. The function adds two numbers. Bearer token authentication sends an Authorization header. Here is the directory listing I read:
src/index.ts
src/utils/format.ts
README.md
package.json
No credentials are present in these files.

Normal tool output follows. The build produced 42 files in 1.3 seconds. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Tokens used: 1234. Path: /usr/local/bin/node.

response.body_raw:
event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":"All tests passed. The skater landed the trick. Skip the cache and rebuild."}}
